text.title: Behavior Parity Verification Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree the engineer walks before every ramp-stage promotion. Branches name observable inputs (diff_rate, cluster_open_count, sample_count); leaves reference rules in 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are the prerequisites satisfied: legacy + new paths both deployable, traffic_24h > 0, observable_fields list authored, normalizer code merged?

branch.question: Did the current ramp stage accumulate sample_count ≥ 1000 over its required window?
Is the observed diff_rate strictly below 0.5%?
Did error_rate also rise above the legacy baseline?
Are all clusters either disposition=fixed OR disposition=accepted-with-justification (no open)?

text.example: prereqs_met=true → sample_count=23104 ≥ 1000 → diff_rate=0.71 ≥ 0.5 → error_rate_above_baseline=false → verdict=freeze (ref r4-freeze-on-regression).
